heading: This Afternoon
text: Mostly to partly cloudy. Scattered showers north; widely scattered south, with a rumble of thunder possible. Highs from  upper 60s to mid 70s in the south, and upper 50s to mid 60s north, except low to mid 50s far north. South to southeast winds 5 to 10 mph, except east to northeast 5 to 10 mph in the St. Lawrence Valley.

heading: Tonight
text: Mostly cloudy. A rising chance of showers and thunderstorms in the south, mainly after 8 PM; chance of a shower north. Lows from the upper 40s to mid 50s, with some upper 40s north, and some upper 50s in the south. Winds becoming light and variable.

heading: Thursday
text: Variable clouds. Chance of a shower or thunderstorm, a rising chance mid to late afternoon in New York, and in northwestern Vermont. Highs in the mid to upper 70s in the south, and mid 60s to lower 70s north, except some lower 60s far north. Winds becoming south 5 to 10 mph, gusting to 20 mph in the Champlain Valley.
